gt_sql: SELECT STRFTIME('%Y', T2.Date) - STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday), T1.Diagnosis FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID ORDER BY T2.HGB DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT STRFTIME('%Y', T2.Date) - STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday), T1.Diagnosis
FROM Patient AS T1
INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
ORDER BY T2.HGB DESC
LIMIT 1;
question: How old was the patient who had the highest hemoglobin count at the time of the examination, and what is the doctor's diagnosis?
